initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, dist.A11 DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, dist.A11 DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dist ON a.district_id = dist.district_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, dist.A11 DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dist ON a.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE a.date = (
    SELECT MIN(a2.date)
    FROM account a2
    WHERE a2.district_id = (
        SELECT district_id
        FROM district
        ORDER BY A11 DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE a.district_id = (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A11 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH highest_salary_district AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A11 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN highest_salary_district hsd ON c.district_id = hsd.district_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

candidates.sql:
WITH highest_salary_district AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A11 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN highest_salary_district hsd ON c.district_id = hsd.district_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;
